productDisplayName: Fila Men's Dna Tech Blue Black Shoe
description: The DNA Tech collection has been specifically designed to support the foot with an enduring Fit for people undergoing strenuous work-out sessions. The heels have been fabricated with carbon rubber to deliver comfort, quick reflexes and durability. One might say that the DNA Tech has been designed to guide the foot in a natural way from its first landing to take off.Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays for structure and breathability Synthetic rubber casing from the forefoot to the lacing system for  structure Central lacing system for customised, comfortable fit Lushly padded tongue and  mesh collar for snug fit Brand name appliquéd in fibre outside the heel cup Carbon rubber outsole extended and embedded onto the toe box Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for all day step-in comfort Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Full-length phylon midsole for lightweight durability Outsole Outsole made of evergrind rubber which comes with a 7-month guarantee 3 Action system soft polymer placed in the heel for shock absorption, providing increased rear-foot cushioning Midfoot shank containing grooves for added arch support Scooped heel cup for cushioning shoe careDo not machine washWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustStore away from direct sunlight
